archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast / Old Money Tech Hybrid

hierarchy.h1: font-heading text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-text_primary
hierarchy.h2: font-heading text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight text-text_primary border-b border-border_dark pb-4 mb-8

principles: Information-dense but with generous macro whitespace.
Asymmetric grids: heavily weight the left side for navigation and content, right side for metadata and pulses.
Optical alignment: left-align all text, data, and forms. Center alignment is BANNED.
Use structural borders (hairline border-b, border-l) to separate content, not floating cards with shadows.

top_nav_bar.classes: h-16 border-b border-border_dark flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-background
top_nav_bar.notes: Minimalist. Logo on left (font-heading font-semibold text-lg), breadcrumbs or active state next to it. Right side has user/export actions.

dimension_progress_rail.classes: w-64 border-r border-border_light h-full min-h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] pr-6 py-8 flex flex-col gap-2
dimension_progress_rail.notes: List of dimensions. Active state: border-l-2 border-accent pl-3 text-text_primary font-medium. Inactive: pl-3 text-text_tertiary hover:text-text_secondary transition-colors.

sub_dimension_card.classes: border border-border_light bg-surface p-8 flex flex-col gap-6
sub_dimension_card.notes: No shadow, sharp corners (rounded-none). Left-aligned title (h3) and description (body). Houses the maturity selector.

maturity_selector.segment: flex-1 border border-border_light flex flex-col justify-center px-3 cursor-pointer transition-all
maturity_selector.label: font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider
maturity_selector.notes: A continuous stepped control (Not Started -> Operationalized). Visual progression with solid fill when active.

score_hero_numeral.classes: font-mono text-7xl md:text-9xl tracking-tighter text-text_primary leading-none
score_hero_numeral.notes: Pair with a smaller '/100' in text-text_tertiary.

badges_and_chips.maturity_band: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 border border-border_dark font-mono text-xs uppercase bg-surface text-text_primary
badges_and_chips.confidence_chip: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-mono text-[10px] uppercase border
badges_and_chips.recommendation_pill: inline-flex items-center px-4 py-2 bg-text_primary text-surface font-body text-sm font-medium

dimension_breakdown_bar.container: flex items-center gap-4 w-full py-3 border-b border-border_light
dimension_breakdown_bar.label: w-48 font-body text-sm font-medium text-text_primary

blocker_callout.classes: border-l-4 border-[#7F1D1D] bg-[#7F1D1D]/5 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2
blocker_callout.notes: Use for high-risk flags. Includes an icon (lucide: AlertTriangle), red heading, and specific remediation text.

reasoning_narrative.classes: font-heading text-2xl leading-relaxed text-text_primary border-l-2 border-border_dark pl-8 py-2 my-8 italic
reasoning_narrative.notes: Editorial pull-quote treatment for the LLM executive summary.

methodology_accordion.trigger: font-mono text-xs uppercase text-text_secondary flex justify-between w-full cursor-pointer

instructions: Use @media print to hide navigation rails, top nav, and interactive controls.
Ensure body background forces to white for print.
Convert text colors to pure black for high contrast.
Use page-break-inside: avoid on sub_dimension_card and blocker_callout.
Force background colors to print using print-color-adjust: exact; or -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
Adjust h1 and score_hero sizes down by 20% to fit letter/A4 pages.
Add a print-only header with assessment date and initiative name.

hero_imagery_and_texture.guidance: NO STOCK PHOTOS. The aesthetic relies entirely on typographic hierarchy, strict grids, and premium whitespace.
hero_imagery_and_texture.texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise overlay (opacity 0.02) to the body background to give a tactile 'parchment/document' feel.
hero_imagery_and_texture.hairlines: Use 1px borders extensively to create a tabular, data-rich environment.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.
